metadata.name: Multi-Modal Document Understanding
metadata.description: Complete document understanding combining vision and audio transcription
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Document Image
inputs.description: Path to document image (slides, diagrams, etc.)

inputs.name: Audio Recording
inputs.description: Path to accompanying audio (narration, presentation, etc.)

inputs.name: Analysis Goal
inputs.description: What to extract from the document
inputs.default: Summarize the key points from both visual and audio content

outputs.name: Combined Summary
outputs.description: Integrated summary of visual and audio content

outputs.name: Key Insights
outputs.description: Key insights extracted from both modalities

documentation.overview: This advanced multi-modal workflow combines vision and audio analysis for comprehensive document understanding. VisionAgent analyzes visual content (slides, diagrams, charts) while TranscriptionAgent processes accompanying audio (presentations, narrations). Perfect for processing conference presentations, video lectures, product demos, and any content combining visual and audio information.
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
Both image and audio files accessible via file paths
Image formats: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP
Audio formats: MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, WEBM (max 25 MB)

example_inputs.analysis_goal: Create a comprehensive summary of this product launch presentation
Explain this system architecture based on the diagram and walkthrough

visual_analysis.slide_content: Product roadmap diagram showing Q1-Q4 2025 milestones

audio_transcription.transcription: As you can see on this slide, we have an ambitious roadmap for 2025. We're starting with a beta launch in Q1, targeting early adopters. The public release follows in Q2, with enterprise features rolling out in Q3. By Q4, we'll be ready for global expansion.

example_outputs.combined_summary: The 2025 product roadmap follows a four-phase approach: Q1 begins with a beta launch targeting early adopters, Q2 transitions to public release for broader market access, Q3 introduces enterprise features for business customers, and Q4 focuses on global market expansion. This staged rollout ensures quality validation and feature maturity at each phase.
key_insights: Early adopter validation in beta phase
